Title: Genome-wide identification and expression analysis of the WRKY gene family in rice (Oryza sativa L.) under drought stress
Abstract: WRKY transcription factors play crucial roles in plant responses to abiotic stresses. In this study, we identified 102 WRKY genes in the rice genome and analyzed their expression patterns under drought stress conditions.

Plant_Genes.Description: WRKY transcription factor 45, involved in disease resistance and abiotic stress response
WRKY transcription factor 76, regulates drought-responsive genes
